candidate_check.description: The Office client must be prevented from polling the SharePoint Server for published links.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Office 2016 >> Server Settings >> Disable the Office client from polling the SharePoint Server for published links is set to "Enabled".

Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key: 

HKCU\software\policies\microsoft\office\16.0\common\portal

If the value for linkpublishingdisabled is REG_DWORD = "1", this is not a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Set the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Office 2016 >> Server Settings >> Disable the Office client from polling the SharePoint Server for published links to "Enabled".
title: The Office client must be prevented from polling the SharePoint Server for published links.
